## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally (when Go code changed)
- [ ] User-visible changes noted under `[Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] OLM/bundle changes: `make bundle` run and `bundle/` committed (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (README, `docs/`, or runbook) when behaviour or ops change
